title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 89.440 - Approval of plats required for recording
text:
89.440.  Approval of plats required for recording. — No county recorder shall receive for filing or recording any subdivision plat required to be approved by a city council or municipal planning commission unless the plat has endorsed upon it the approval of the city council under the hand of the clerk and the seal of the city, or by the secretary of the planning commission.
(L. 1963 p. 146 § 15)
